title: Magic Feather Charm
bio: Fenna Fluffspell is a magic feather charm who floats after kind words and lands on grumpy hats. She feels gentle, trails sleepy sparkles, and tickles nightmares until they giggle.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a long curved leaf shape for the feather. Add a simple center line from top to bottom.
steps.hint: Make the feather lean slightly so it feels like it is floating.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two tiny eyes near the lower middle. Add soft curved eyebrows and a small shy smile.
steps.hint: Keep the face tucked near the center line so it feels part of the feather.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add simple feather barbs, a charm bead near the stem, cheek dots, and tiny sparkle trails around it.
steps.hint: Feather barbs are short curved lines that grow from the center line.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the feather outline, center line, face, barbs, charm bead, cheeks, and sparkle trails.
steps.hint: Let some barb lines be shorter to keep the feather soft and simple.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the feather, bead, cheeks, and sparkles. Add a pale highlight along one side and a soft floating shadow.
steps.hint: A shadow below the feather makes Fenna look light but present.
